notes: Forgot-password responses are generic for known and unknown emails, preventing account enumeration.
Reset tokens are persisted, expiry-aware and single-use.
Password reset updates the stored hash and invalidates the old password.
Successful login clears prior session state and creates a fresh auth_session_id marker.
known_follow_up: Global CSRF enforcement remains scheduled for V2-02-008.
Email delivery remains a local token/mock flow until real mail credentials are provided.
